positive: A whimsical, minimalist forest scene dominated by oversized, bioluminescent mushrooms and glowing fairy flora. The composition features a central pathway winding through the dense undergrowth, creating a strong visual leading line. The style is detailed watercolor etching mixed with digital vaporwave glow, emphasizing high contrast silhouettes against deep jewel-toned backgrounds (sapphire blue, emerald green, violet). Key elements include stylized crescent moons and constellations incorporated into the mushroom caps. Overhead, soft, ethereal dappled light filters through the canopy, highlighting the vibrant glow of the flora. The design must be highly scalable and suitable for a repeat seamless pattern or a central bold motif, rendered with clean lines, graphic weight, and flat vector elements combined with organic textures. Rule of thirds composition, perfect for a t-shirt graphic.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, noisy, artifact, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of frame, cartoonish, lowres, jpeg artifacts, grain, bad anatomy
